prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical daily price data for TFC over the past year (approx. 252 trading days) was used to estimate the daily drift (~0.00063) and volatility (~0.0151). These parameters, along with the current price of $49.31, were used to project the price in 21 days and calculate confidence intervals based on the GBM's log-normal distribution properties.
